items.original_text: Using only 3% of the selected data, the 13B model outperforms models trained on the full dataset.
items.claim_text: 13B 模型仅需 3% 精选数据即可超越完整数据训练效果 [EV-001]
items.report_sentence: 我们预期组合规则能够有效识别噪声样本 [EV-001]。

items.original_text: The data hardness transfers across model scales: samples identified as difficult by the 350M model are also useful for the 13B model (Kendall-Tau=0.52).
items.claim_text: 数据硬度可跨模型规模迁移，350M 模型选出的困难样本对 13B 模型同样有效（Kendall-Tau=0.52）[EV-002]
items.report_sentence: 我们预期 T5（Encoder-Decoder）与 Llama-2（Decoder-only）的 LP 排序相关性显著低于两个 Decoder-only 模型之间的相关性（当前 Llama-1.3B → Llama-7B 为 0.61）[EV-002]。

items.original_text: AlpaGasus is finetuned on only 9k high-quality data filtered from the 52k Alpaca data. Its 13B variant matches >90% performance of its teacher LLM (Text-Davinci-003 generating the 52k data) on test tasks.
items.claim_text: AlpaGasus 使用 9k 筛选数据（从 52k Alpaca 数据中过滤），13B 变体匹配超过 90% 的 teacher LLM 性能（Text-Davinci-003）[EV-003]
items.audit_note: claim声称'AlpaGasus使用9k筛选数据（从52k Alpaca数据中过滤）'，但原文只说'filtered from the 52k Alpaca data'，未明确是9k，claim添加了具体数字；且claim说'匹配超过90%性能'，原文说的是'>90% performance'，原文未明确是哪个具体指标

items.original_text: It also provides 5.7x faster training, reducing the training time for a 7B variant from 80 minutes (for Alpaca) to 14 minutes.
items.claim_text: AlpaGasus 训练速度提升 5.7 倍，7B 变体训练时间从 80 分钟降至 14 分钟 [EV-004]
items.report_sentence: 该方法将训练时间缩短 5.7 倍（7B 模型从 80 分钟降至 14 分钟）[EV-004]，证明了"数据中心"范式在指令微调中的有效性 [EV-010]。

items.original_text: In a controlled human study, responses from LIMA are either equivalent or strictly preferred to GPT-4 in 43% of cases; this statistic is as high as 58% when compared to Bard and 65% versus DaVinci003, which was trained with human feedback.
items.claim_text: LIMA（65B LLaMa，仅用 1000 条精选数据）在人类评估中，43% 的响应等同或偏好于 GPT-4，65% 偏好于 DaVinci003 [EV-005]
items.report_sentence: | LIMA | arXiv:2305.11206 [EV-005] | 开源模型权重 | 低 |

items.original_text: D3 method comprises two key steps of scoring and selection. Achieves competitive or even superior instruction-following capabilities using less than 10% of the entire dataset.
items.claim_text: D3 方法提出多样性、难度、可靠性三维选择准则，在不到 10% 的数据上达到与其他方法相当或更优的指令遵循能力 [EV-006]
items.report_sentence: D3 方法 [EV-006] 提出 Diversity（多样性）、Difficulty（难度）、Dependability（可靠性）三维选择框架，通过 scoring + selection 两步迭代在不到 10% 的数据上达到与其他方法相当或更优的性能。

items.original_text: These results strongly suggest that almost all knowledge in large language models is learned during pretraining, and only limited instruction tuning data is necessary to teach models to produce high quality output.
items.claim_text: LIMA 证明大语言模型几乎所有知识都在预训练阶段学习，指令微调只需少量高质量数据即可教会模型生成高质量输出 [EV-007]
items.report_sentence: LIMA 的核心洞察是：大语言模型几乎所有知识都在预训练阶段习得，指令微调只需少量高质量数据即可教会模型生成符合人类偏好的输出格式 [EV-007]。

items.original_text: LP(i) = (P_{i-1} - P_i) / (P_0 - P_n), which measures how much of the total learning amount is accomplished in the i-th epoch.
items.claim_text: LP 指标的核心公式：LP(i) = (P_{i-1} - P_i) / (P_0 - P_n)，衡量每个 epoch 中模型学习了多少总学习量 [EV-008]
items.report_sentence: LP_app 在不同模型规模上与原始 LP 保持中等相关性（Kendall-Tau ≈ 0.55），这表明它可以作为高效的近似方案 [EV-008]。

items.original_text: SAEs can serve as a good alternative to diversity measure and design our method to be scalable for potential industrial large-scale pruning.
items.claim_text: SAE 可作为数据多样性测量的有效替代方案，通过稀疏自编码器分析模型激活来识别多样化样本 [EV-009]
items.report_sentence: 基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）的多样性测量方法 [EV-009] 证明了 SAE 可以作为数据多样性测量的有效替代方案。

items.original_text: Overall, AlpaGasus demonstrates a novel data-centric IFT paradigm that can be generally applied to instruction-tuning data, leading to faster training and better instruction-following models.
items.claim_text: AlpaGasus 证明数据选择比数据规模更重要，为指令微调提供了一种新颖的数据中心范式 [EV-010]
items.report_sentence: 该方法将训练时间缩短 5.7 倍（7B 模型从 80 分钟降至 14 分钟）[EV-004]，证明了"数据中心"范式在指令微调中的有效性 [EV-010]。

items.original_text: D3 method comprises two key steps of scoring and selection. Achieves competitive or even superior instruction-following capabilities using less than 10% of the entire dataset.
items.claim_text: D3 方法通过 scoring 和 selection 两步迭代在不到 10% 的数据上达到与其他方法相当或更优的性能 [EV-006]

items.original_text: SAEs can serve as a good alternative to diversity measure and design our method to be scalable for potential industrial large-scale pruning.
items.claim_text: 稀疏自编码器可以识别模型激活空间中的多样化样本，提供对模型行为的可解释性 [EV-009]

items.original_text: D3 method comprises two key steps of scoring and selection. Achieves competitive or even superior instruction-following capabilities using less than 10% of the entire dataset.
items.claim_text: D3 方法采用多样性、难度、可靠性三维准则，比单一准则的数据选择方法更有效 [EV-006]
